tasks.title: Organizar estrutura de pastas (bug_lab/, recordings/, semantic_tests/)
tasks.description: Create bug_lab/pages/, bug_lab/tests/, bug_lab/fixtures/ directories. Add README templates for bugs. Ensure recordings/, semantic_tests/ structure is clean.

tasks.title: Criar template de página de bug + template de teste
tasks.description: Create bug_lab/pages/template/index.html with minimal structure. Create bug_lab/tests/template_test.py. Create bug_lab/README.md explaining the cycle: reproduce → verify → fix → validate.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: seletor vazio/inválido
tasks.description: Create bug_lab/pages/bug-empty-selector/index.html. Create test that fails when selector is empty. Document symptom, cause, reproduction steps.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: seletor frágil (ID dinâmico)
tasks.description: Create page with dynamically changing button ID. Test that selector healing works via text fallback. Already partially covered by curation tests.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: mat-icon contaminando accessible name
tasks.description: Create page with Angular Material button containing mat-icon. Test that accessible name cleaning removes icon text. Already partially done in _clean_text().

tasks.title: Bug Lab: BADSTRING/texto com aspas em seletores
tasks.description: Create page with button text containing quotes. Test that selector escaping works correctly.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: upload de arquivos (set_input_files)
tasks.description: Create page with file input. Test that recording uses set_input_files not fill("C:\\fakepath\\..."). Create fixture files.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: múltiplos file inputs diferenciados
tasks.description: Create page with 2+ file inputs. Test that generated selectors are distinct per input (by label, position, aria-label).

tasks.title: Bug Lab: select/options jQuery não capturados
tasks.description: Create page with jQuery-enhanced select. Test that recording correctly identifies select element and generates select_option(). Already partially fixed in BUG-001.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: datepicker sem validação
tasks.description: Create page with date input. Test that date selection generates proper fill/select_option and validation works.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: encoding inconsistente
tasks.description: Create page with UTF-8 special characters. Test that recording preserves encoding correctly.

tasks.title: Script de consolidação de artefatos para LLM
tasks.description: Create scripts/consolidate_artifacts.py that combines recordings/ and semantic_tests/ into single document for LLM analysis.

tasks.title: Docs: criar visao.md + arquitetura-enxuta.md + mapa-estrategico.md
tasks.description: Create three architecture docs: visao (project vision), arquitetura-enxuta (execution path), mapa-estrategico (strategic map). Follow consolidated plan decisions.

tasks.title: Docs: criacao de ADRs sem SpecKit
tasks.description: Create ADR-0001 (arquitetura enxuta como execucao) and ADR-0002 (SpecKit fora da pipeline). Document decisions explicitly.

tasks.title: Pipeline CI: GitHub Actions workflow
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/test.yml with matrix python 3.10-3.13. Run pytest on push/PR. Upload test artifacts.
